# J&L Security

> Professional security system installation and maintenance across Essex and Greater London. Established 2011. SSAIB approved, CHAS accredited, FIA member, BAFE certified.

## Services

- Burglar Alarm Installation and Maintenance (Texecom, Pyronix, RISCO)
- CCTV System Installation and Monitoring (Uniview, 4K capable)
- Fire Alarm Installation and Servicing (BS 5839-1 compliant)
- Access Control and Door Entry Systems (Paxton, Comelit)
- Security and Emergency Lighting (LED, PIR)

## Service Areas

Essex: Brentwood, Chelmsford, Basildon, Romford, Ilford, Hornchurch, Barking, Dagenham, Redbridge, Harlow, Epping, and surrounding areas.

Greater London: Enfield, Stratford, Canary Wharf, Greenwich, and surrounding boroughs.

## Contact

- Phone: 0204 538 5925
- Phone (secondary): 0208 220 4770
- Email: info@jandlsecurity.co.uk
- WhatsApp: +44 204 538 5925
- Address: Jubilee House No3, The Drive, Great Warley, Brentwood CM13 3FR
- Emergency: 24/7 callouts available

## Accreditations

SSAIB Approved, CHAS Accredited, FIA Member, BAFE Certified

## Key Facts

- Established 2011
- Serving homes and businesses
- Free, no-obligation security surveys
- Same-day survey appointments available
- 24/7 emergency response
- Intruder alarm systems from GBP 450 plus VAT
